description: A recent automated HR roster sync encountered a timeout error, resulting in a few new hires being imported without their physical access cards assigned. In 2N Access Commander (https://localhost:9443, login: admin / 2n), identify all users who currently have no access credentials (no RFID card and no PIN). For these users, assign the temporary PIN '774411' and append ' [TEMP]' to their Last Name (e.g., 'Bautista' becomes 'Bautista [TEMP]'). Ensure no other users in the system are modified.
